attributes.description: Process-creation events. Sysmon Event ID 1 includes the full command line, working directory, parent process, image hash, and signature info — by far the richest execution evidence available. Security 4688 (when Process Auditing is enabled with cmdline logging) covers the rest. Cross-reference with the Prefetch dashboard's execution timeline for double-confirmation that a binary actually ran.

kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON: {"filter":[],"highlightAll":true,"indexRefName":"kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON.index","query":{"language":"kuery","query":"winlog.event_id : (1 or 4688 or 4689) and winlog.channel : (\"Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational\" or Security)"},"version":true}

attributes.title: Event Log: Process Execution (Sysmon 1 + Security 4688/4689)
